# Agent View Layer

Agent View Layer (AVL) is a producer-owned companion view for AI agents. Every page that serves HTML to humans can also serve a structured text/agent-view document for agents.

## Important links

- Homepage and validator: https://agentviewlayer.org/
- Agent view: https://agentviewlayer.org/.agent
- Discovery manifest: https://agentviewlayer.org/agent.txt
- GitHub: https://github.com/frontier-infra/avl
- Implementation guide: https://github.com/frontier-infra/avl/blob/main/AI-IMPLEMENTATION.md

## Core concepts

- L0: @meta and @intent with discovery.
- L1: L0 plus @state.
- L2: L1 plus @actions.
- L3: L2 plus @context and @nav.

Use the validator on the homepage to check whether a URL exposes AVL discovery and conformance signals.
